zh.lifeSummary: 當Gerberga de laTour Rochefoucauld於1024年出生在法國波特-哈倫斯維安洛奇時，她的父親Foucauld de la Rochefoucauld I47歲，母親Gersende de Châtellérault30歲。她於1035年與Hugues de Chatellerault I結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1093年在法國波特-哈倫斯維安a特勒勞爾特享年69歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gerberga de laTour Rochefoucauld于1024年出生在法国波特-哈倫斯維安洛奇时，她的父亲Foucauld de la Rochefoucauld I47岁，母亲Gersende de Châtellérault30岁。她于1035年与Hugues de Chatellerault I结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1093年在法国波特-哈倫斯維安a特勒勞爾特享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

nameMeanings.name: laTour
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Andre, Antoine, Gaston, Marcel, Pierre, Armand, Cecile, Fernand, Jacques, Jean-Claude, Laurent.

French: topographic name for someone who lived near a tower, usually a defensive fortification or watchtower, from Old French tūr; or a habitational name from any of various places called Latour or La Tour, named with this word.

History: Pierre Latour dit Laforge from France was in QC by 1705, when he married Étiennette Banliac. His descendants also bear the surname Laforge . — In North America, this surname was originally also a secondary surname or dit (‘also called’) name, borne by several 17th and 18th-century French Canadians.

variants.name: Laforge
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Alban, Alphonse, Armand, Camille, Lucien.
metonymic occupational name for a blacksmith or a topographic name for someone who lived by a forge, from la forge ‘the smithy’ (compare Forge ).

variants.name: Latourelle
meanings: French: habitational name from La Tourelle, the name of several places in various parts of France, or a diminutive of the topographic name   Latour  . This surname is very rare in France. Compare   Latterell  .

variants.name: Latourette
meanings: French: habitational name from Latourette or La Tourette, names of several places in the southern part of France, or a diminutive of the topographic name   Latour  . This surname is very rare in France.

History: This surname is listed (in the form La Tourette) in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America.

en.lifeSummary: When Gerberga de laTour Rochefoucauld was born in 1024, in Roche, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, France, her father, Foucauld de la Rochefoucauld I, was 47 and her mother, Gersende de Châtellérault, was 30. She married Hugues de Chatellerault I in 1035. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in 1093, in Châtellerault, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, France, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gerberga de laTour Rochefoucauld est née en 1024, à Roche, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, France, son père, Foucauld de la Rochefoucauld I, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Gersende de Châtellérault, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Hugues de Chatellerault I en 1035. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée en 1093, à Châtellerault, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, France, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gerberga de laTour Rochefoucauld 1024 in Roche, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Foucauld de la Rochefoucauld I 47 und ihre Mutter Gersende de Châtellérault 30. Sie hat 1035 Hugues de Chatellerault I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb 1093 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Châtellerault, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gerberga de laTour Rochefoucauld è nata il nel 1024 nel Roche, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Francia, sua padre, Foucauld de la Rochefoucauld I, aveva 47 anni e sua madre, Gersende de Châtellérault, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Hugues de Chatellerault I nel 1035. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1093, nel Châtellerault, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Francia, all'età di 69 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gerberga de laTour Rochefoucauldが1024年にフランスポイトウ-チャーエンツヴィエンロチェで生まれた時，父Foucauld de la Rochefoucauld Iは47歳，母Gersende de Châtelléraultは30歳であった。1035年にHugues de Chatellerault Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1093年にフランスポイトウ-チャーエンツヴィエンチaテラーアウルトで69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gerberga de laTour Rochefoucauld(이)가 1024년 프랑스 포이토우-처츠 비니 록헤에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Foucauld de la Rochefoucauld I(은)는 47세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gersende de Châtellérault(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1035년 Hugues de Chatellerault I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1093년 프랑스 포이토우-처츠 비니 cha텔레라트에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gerberga de laTour Rochefoucauld nasceu em 1024, em Roche, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, França, seu pai, Foucauld de la Rochefoucauld I, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Gersende de Châtellérault, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Hugues de Chatellerault I em 1035. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1093, em Châtellerault, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, França, com 69 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gerberga de laTour Rochefoucauld родилась в 1024 г. в местности рош, виенн, поитоу-чарентесь, Франция, её отцу по имени Foucauld de la Rochefoucauld I было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Gersende de Châtellérault, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugues de Chatellerault I в 1035 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла в 1093 г. в местности чaтеллираулт, виенн, поитоу-чарентесь, Франция в возрасте 69 лет.

sm.from 1075 to 1092: mai le 1075 e o'o I le 1092

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gerberga de laTour Rochefoucauld nació en 1024, en Roche, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Francia, su papá, Foucauld de la Rochefoucauld I, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Gersende de Châtellérault, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Hugues de Chatellerault I en 1035. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1093, en Châtellerault, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Francia, a la edad de 69 años.
